qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authentication bypass via proxy auth header spoofing allows full admin impersonation
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code location (auth/proxy.go vs http/auth.go signup handler), different root cause (missing trusted-proxy validation for header origin vs missing guard to strip admin from self-registered accounts), and different attack path (spoofing proxy auth header when proxy auth is enabled vs exploiting signup endpoint when defaults.perm.admin=true). The proxy-auth-header-spoofing finding targets the proxy authentication mechanism, while the advisory describes a vulnerability in the signup handler that blindly applies default permissions including admin privileges.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The qualifying finding does not identify the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory describes a privilege escalation vulnerability in the signup handler (http/auth.go) where default permissions including admin are blindly applied to self-registered accounts when signup is enabled and defaults.perm.admin is true. The proxy-auth-header-spoofing finding targets a different authentication mechanism (proxy auth in auth/proxy.go) with a different root cause (missing trusted-proxy validation). The finding is a legitimate vulnerability but does not match the advisory-described signup/permission-inheritance issue.
evidence: Advisory specifies vulnerable code location: http/auth.go signup handler applying d.settings.Defaults.Apply(user) without stripping admin
Advisory requires preconditions: signup=true AND defaults.perm.admin=true
Advisory attack vector: unauthenticated visitor registers account via public signup endpoint
proxy-auth-header-spoofing finding targets auth/proxy.go with vulnerable code reading r.Header.Get(a.Header) without trusted-proxy verification
proxy-auth-header-spoofing finding requires auth.method=proxy configured, different precondition from advisory
proxy-auth-header-spoofing finding exploits proxy authentication mechanism, not signup permission inheritance
